visual_features.overall_style: Modern, clean, and slightly editorial with a warm, premium feel. Uses a monochrome + gold palette, large rounded rectangles, and soft shadows. Visual language is calm and trustworthy, appropriate for an architecture/home builder portfolio rather than flashy marketing.
visual_features.visual_hierarchy: Hierarchy is driven by strong color blocks, size, and positioning. The full-width gold header bar forms the primary anchor, followed by the large 'SNS' page title on the left. Secondary attention goes to the prominent search and filter controls on the right of the same band. Below, equally sized content cards form a grid; within each card the video thumbnail (image) is the main focal point, then the small gold 'YOUTUBE' label, then the bold first line of text. Navigation pills and CTAs (‘Sign In’, ‘Sign Up’) are highlighted via contrast (white pills on gold, elevated with rounded borders).
visual_features.whitespace_usage: Whitespace is generous but not extreme. Each card has substantial internal padding and clear separation from neighbors via consistent gutters. The header bar has plenty of vertical padding around the logo/navigation, and the main content area has a comfortable top margin from the header. Text within cards is allowed to wrap with clear line spacing, avoiding a cramped feel even with dense descriptions.
unique_elements: Wide gold header band that merges global navigation, page title, and search/filter controls into a single colored strip.
Pill-shaped navigation chips and CTAs sitting on a solid color bar, giving a segmented-control feel rather than a standard text nav.
Consistent use of large, softly rounded cards with integrated media thumbnails for each SNS item.
Search field and filter dropdown designed as large pill components visually aligned with the navigation chips, creating a unified control surface.

layout_characteristics.grid_system: Likely a 12-column responsive grid with equal-width gutters. On this desktop view, four cards per row suggest each card spans roughly 3 columns plus gutter, with outer margins on both sides.
layout_characteristics.layout_pattern: Full-width top header with horizontal navigation and controls, followed by a centered content area using a multi-column card grid.
layout_characteristics.section_organization: Top-level global header (logo/name + navigation + auth actions) is integrated into a single colored strip. Directly beneath, still within that strip, a subsection contains the page title on the left and search/filter controls on the right. Below the header band, the main content section is a uniform grid of SNS cards. There are no visible sidebars; all primary content flows vertically.
layout_characteristics.alignment: Left-aligned content for logo/name, section title, and card text. Navigation items and CTAs are horizontally aligned inside the header. Cards are evenly aligned in a grid with consistent margins. Text inside cards is left-aligned, supporting scanning. Inputs and buttons in the header are aligned along a baseline forming a horizontal control row.
responsive_hints: Four-column card grid suggests breakpoints will reduce to two or one column on smaller screens.
Pill shaped nav items and search/filter components lend themselves to stacking vertically under the page title on mobile.
Global header likely becomes taller on mobile with nav collapsing into a menu or scrollable pill row.
Cards have self-contained content, suitable for stacking vertically on narrow screens.
layout_characteristics.content_arrangement: Linear top-to-bottom flow. 1) A full-width gold header band containing: left-aligned brand name, center/left nav chips, and right-aligned 'Sign In' and 'Sign Up' pills. 2) Within the same gold band but visually separated by spacing, the page-level heading 'SNS' appears on the left, with a large pill-shaped search bar and a pill-shaped 'Filter' dropdown aligned to the right. 3) Below the gold band, a light neutral background hosts a 4-column grid of vertically oriented cards. Each card: top portion is an image (video thumbnail) spanning the full card width with rounded top corners; below that, text content: a small uppercase category label in gold, then a bold-ish title/first line, then several lines of body/description text broken into paragraphs or meta info (dates, links).
layout_characteristics.space_allocation: Header band occupies roughly the top 15–20% of the viewport height with comfortable vertical padding. The gold band width is full-screen; within it, content is constrained to a central max-width column (likely 1100–1200px). The main content area below takes the remaining viewport, dominated by the SNS card grid. Each card uses about 40–45% of its vertical height for the image and the remaining 55–60% for text. Horizontal gutters between cards and side margins are generous (~24–32px). Vertical spacing between the header band and the first row of cards is also generous, creating a clear break between navigation/controls and content.
layout_characteristics.content_density: Moderately spacious. Cards contain quite a bit of text, but generous line-height and padding keep the layout from feeling crowded. The grid is dense horizontally (four items across) but softened by whitespace between cards, rounded corners, and consistent padding. The overall effect is an information-rich layout that still feels breathable.
layout_characteristics.visual_flow: Primary flow is a horizontal Z-pattern at the top: the eye starts at the top-left brand name, moves across the navigation chips to the top-right 'Sign In/Sign Up' buttons, dips down to the left-aligned 'SNS' title, then crosses to the right-side search and filter controls. From there, attention drops vertically into the card grid, scanning left-to-right across each row. Within each card, the eye moves from the thumbnail image downward to the 'YOUTUBE' label and then the textual details.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Buttons are pill-shaped rounded rectangles (approx. 24px–28px corner radius). 'Sign Up' appears with a solid white background, gold text, and possibly a subtle soft shadow or border to add elevation against the gold header. 'Sign In' appears as a bordered or text-style pill on the gold background (white border or lighter gold fill). Text is medium-weight uppercase or title-case sans-serif. Padding is substantial horizontally (≈16–24px) and moderate vertically (≈8–10px), producing compact but prominent pills. Overall style is flat with slight depth, no heavy gradients.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Typically implemented as either `<button>` elements or `<a>` links styled as buttons. Likely wrapped in a flex container for horizontal distribution with consistent gaps. Structure: `<button class="btn btn-primary">Label</button>` and `<button class="btn btn-outline">Label</button>`, where modifiers control fill vs outline styles.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Cards are large vertical rectangles with generous corner rounding (≈16px). They use a white background (#FFFFFF) on a light neutral page background. Separation from the background is by subtle drop shadow and/or a soft 1px border in a light gray (#E0D8C8). The top image covers full card width with its top corners matching the card’s radius; bottom corners of the image are square so the content area below is clearly divided. Internally, padding is ≈16–24px on all sides. Text is left-aligned with a small gold uppercase label above the main title. Vertical spacing between text blocks is consistent (≈8–12px). No heavy outlines; emphasis is on cleanliness and readability.

`. Cards are laid out in a CSS Grid or flex-based multi-column container.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Form elements are visible in the search bar and filter dropdown. The search field is a wide pill-shaped container with a softly rounded full radius (≈24px–32px), background slightly lighter than the gold header (or semi-transparent white), with an inset search icon on the left and placeholder text in a lighter neutral color. There is no heavy border; the field relies on contrast and subtle inner shadow or outline. The 'Filter' control is also a pill button with a down-chevron, matching the search field’s height and corner radius. Overall form density is low, prioritizing large tap targets.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Search box likely implemented as `<form>` with `<input type="search">` inside a wrapper `<div class="search">` containing an inline SVG icon. Filter is probably a `<button>` that triggers a dropdown menu (`<ul>` or `<div>`). Labels are implicit (placeholder for search and button text for filter). Fields are full-width within their flex containers on small screens and auto-sized on larger screens.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Global navigation is horizontal and chip-based. Items such as 'SNS', '360° ...', and 'More' are pill-shaped tabs sitting on the gold header. Active state (here 'SNS') appears in a higher-contrast style—likely a lighter pill or white pill with gold text—while inactive items are low-contrast with borderless or subtly outlined pills. The 'More' item includes a down-chevron, indicating a dropdown. Spacing between nav chips is moderate (≈12–16px), giving a clean, segmented feel. Text is small-to-medium, uppercase or sentence case sans-serif. No hard dividers; emphasis relies on pill shapes and color contrast.

ui_patterns.visual_description: The SNS content grid functions as a card-based list. Each list item (card) has consistent width, height, and spacing, with no visible row separators—separation is via card bounding boxes and whitespace. Density is moderate: four cards per row with generous internal padding. Thumbnail (vertical video frame) is always at the top, acting as a visual cue. Text hierarchy inside each card uses small uppercase category label, then a stronger title line, then lighter-weight body text.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern:

` or a simple `
` with repeated `.card` children. Layout likely uses CSS Grid (`grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(...)))`) or flexbox with wrapping.

heading.visual_style: Modern, neutral sans-serif with relatively high x-height and clean, simple letterforms—similar to system UI fonts (SF Pro / Segoe UI). Headings are slightly heavier weight, not extremely condensed or decorative, giving a calm, professional look suitable for architecture.

body.visual_style: Clean humanist/grotesque sans-serif with good readability at small sizes. Body text appears regular-weight with clear distinction between uppercase labels and lowercase body, mirroring typical system UI typography.

spacing_system.component_padding: Cards and pill controls appear to use 16px–24px horizontal padding and 8px–16px vertical padding, corresponding to 2x–3x the base unit.
spacing_system.section_margin: Vertical spacing between major sections (header band and card grid, grid and subsequent sections) appears to be around 48px–64px, matching 6x–8x the base unit.

interaction_hints: Buttons and nav pills likely use hover states with background-color lightening/darkening and possibly a subtle shadow increase or border change. Active nav item remains in a high-contrast pill.
Cards may feature hover elevation: slight scale-up (1.01–1.03) and stronger shadow to indicate clickability, possibly with a cursor change and maybe a faint image darken/overlay.
Search input likely shows a clearer outline or glow on focus, with the placeholder text fading and cursor prominent.
Filter button probably opens a dropdown or panel with smooth fade/slide animation (150–250ms) aligned under the button.
Micro-interactions should remain subtle and refined—easing functions like ease-out, no bouncy or playful animations, reflecting the calm, premium architecture brand.
